subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth unto them who have quaffed the choice wine of utterance and hearkened unto the Call from the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق لمن شرب رحیق البیان و سمع الندآء من الافق الاعلی الملک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
